alt: Hoatzin standing proudly amidst the tropical foliage of Colombia
caption: Their extensive range spans across the Amazon and Orinoco basins of Brazil, Peru, Colombia, Ecuador, and Bolivia.
acquisitionNotes: High-quality composition representing Orinoco regional habitat. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/5/50/Opisthocomus_hoazin_Chenchena_Hoatzin_%286260863096%29.jpg
